purpose: Serum dropper captured mid-drip with droplet about to fall.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Dynamic product photography of {product_descriptor} serum dropper actively dripping single golden droplet caught mid-fall toward bottle below, droplet frozen at 1/8000 shutter, glass dropper visible in upper frame, bottle with logo at base catching light, soft pastel background, dramatic side light, shot on 100mm macro at f/5.6, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T44. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi serum/oil brands. Strong for argan oil, vitamin C serum, rose oil popular in Saudi premium beauty. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month.
